emails.subject: Re: Canadian Prepay
emails.body: Re: Canadian Prepay I actually received the last document I need to put otgether binders this week. Linda and I will compile closing binders with all the relevant documents next week and send you one set for your files. I will send copies of the RBC documents to Rick at the same time. So, when are you going to come and enjoy our crisp weather? Mark Taylor e-mailed me saying he thought it was a good idea for you to come up here to train Linda and Sharon. It ain't Stampede, but at least Peter and I can return the hospitality. From: Tana Jones on 11/10/2000 11:15 AM CST

emails.subject: Canadian Prepay
emails.body: Canadian Prepay Rick Borden at Macleod Dixon sent us a fax requesing copies of the documents on the prepay. Can you send him a copy? Also, when they're all together, can you send a copy to me for our files. Thanks!

emails.subject: Canadian Prepay
emails.body: Canadian Prepay Rick Borden at Macleod Dixon sent us a fax requesing copies of the documents on the prepay. Can you send him a copy? Also, when they're all together, can you send a copy to me for our files. Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: Canadian Prepay
emails.body: I checked w/Mark Taylor, and he can't approve me going to Calgary until he checks it with Mark Haedicke to see if it's OK, which he won't do until he gets back in town, which is in two weeks. I hope that isn't going to cause any problems... Greg Johnston 11/10/2000 11:20 AM
